name: AuditApp_Resources_Summary
query:
SELECT
    rt.ID AS ResourceTypeID,
    rt.Name AS ResourceType,
    COUNT(*) AS UpdatesCount,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ru.SessionID) AS SessionCount,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ru.ResourceName) AS UniqueResourcesTouched
FROM ResourceUpdates AS ru
INNER JOIN ResourceTypes AS rt
    ON ru.ResourceTypeID = rt.ID
GROUP BY
    rt.ID,
    rt.Name
ORDER BY
    rt.ID;
